description: Default workflow steps for PRD and ad-hoc modes. Projects can override these by defining workflows in their project.json.

prd.description: Comprehensive workflow for planned PRD work. Includes full test coverage, code review, and visual verification.

adhoc.description: Fast workflow for quick fixes and ad-hoc requests. Uses scoped testing for speed.

tester-scoped.description: Write tests scoped to changed files only

build.description: Delegate to @developer to implement the feature

test-scoped.description: Run only tests for files changed in this session

critic.description: Run @critic for code review (routes to specialist critics)

tester.description: Run @tester to write/update unit tests for new code

tester-scoped.description: Run @tester in ad-hoc mode (scoped to changed files)

visual-verify.description: Take screenshot to verify UI changes
visual-verify.condition: UI files were changed (components, styles, pages)

toolkit-suggestions.description: Analyze work done and suggest toolkit improvements
